item.title: What Happened Today #33
item.description: Trump's reckless maneuvers push the nation to the brink: cutting Ukraine intel, closing schools, firing thousands, and issuing deadly ultimatums while courts and protests rise in defiance. Pass it on. #resist #GovBriefToday LINKS 1 - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/05/us-ukraine-intelligence-sharing-00213100 2 - https://www.npr.org/2025/03/05/nx-s1-5316227/trump-order-dismantling-education-department 3 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/05/va-layoff-federal-employees/81624579007/ 4 - https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/divided-supreme-court-upholds-order-requiring-trump-administration-to-release-2-billion-in-foreign-aid 5 - https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0mwln4p87do 6 - https://www.reuters.com/world/americas/us-make-canada-mexico-tariff-announcement-wednesday-commerce-chief-says-2025-03-05/ 7 - https://federalnewsnetwork.com/workforce/2025/03/thousands-of-fired-usda-employees-to-be-temporarily-reinstated-following-mspb-decision/ 8 - https://www.voanews.com/a/vance-visits-mexico-border-says-us-won-t-invade-mexico-/8000678.html 9 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/republicans-cannot-meet-budget-target-cutting-medicare-medicaid-budget-rcna195042 10 - https://www.usnews.com/news/top-news/articles/2025-03-05/us-judge-bars-trump-administration-from-cutting-nih-research-funding 11 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/trump-demands-dc-mayor-clear-homeless-encampments-and-warns-he-may-do-it-for-her/ar-AA1AkIvW 12 - https://apnews.com/article/fema-ruling-migrant-shelters-new-york-7438c39d5ae66fdb06240d0080020b29 13 - https://abcnews.go.com/US/wireStory/senate-confirms-former-trump-defense-attorney-todd-blanche-119489726 14 - https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/05/appeals-court-allows-trump-administration-to-remove-federal-ethics-watchdog.html FIGHTING BACK - https://www.conwaydailysun.com/news/local/massive-turnout-for-anti-trump-protest/article_ad29c75e-f9bd-11ef-83fe-9be3af001552.html Archive - https://govbrief.today

item.title: Dumps of Unusual Size 18: Movies, TV, Books, & Games, Part 3
item.description:
Honestly, my first experience with Tim Curry was "Fern Gully"
I reject your POIT, and substitute it with my ZORT!
I still haven't forgiven the original "Jurassic PArk" for not showing the T rex swimming in the canal like in the book.
Almost 41 years ago now.
Surely there is an Evil Overlord Rule that applies to this...
The Agent
So my parents were moving and they had a little cherub sitting with its head in its hands that they weren't going to keep. Early every Monday, I was driving out of town once a week for a few months, and one morning I put it in the front planter of a friend who lived on my way. Then every following Monday I would swing by and move the statue a little closer to their front door. Eventually it was on their porch right in front of the steps. He never knew it was me, and told a mutual friend the story of the freaky little statue that had appeared in his yard and kept moving.
item.dc:creator: Schadwen

item.title: One Of The Greats
item.description: Wishing you fair journey on your next awesome assignment Gene.
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Goodbye Uncle Bill
item.description: I'm mostly just trying to get the grief to be outside of me right now so I don't choke on it. I doubt I will go to his funeral. I doubt he would care. I hope he knows he was my favorite. (6 uncles on my dad's side and 4 on my mom's, so it actually means something.) Edit: Thank you for all your kind words and advice. It seems to be an even split of go vs don't go. Which is actually comforting. It means there probably is no right answer, so I should just be comfortable with the one that I make. Thanks everyone.
item.dc:creator: ArcaneM37

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
got my meme sorting caught up. have plenty more to dump. enjoy!
yea so glad I am not like that.
got a few of these.
liars and cheaters will always be just that. fuck em.
om. om. my birthday is coming up as you well know :p
replace annoy with other words.
hehehe. yea. I like my coffee.
yea I keep coming back. memes. yay.
I thought i just posted this. why is my memory so bad. le sigh.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "Life is made up of desires that seem big and vital one minute, and little and absurd the next. I guess we get what's best for us in the end." - Alice Caldwell Rice I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Catch Me if You Can
item.description: Roller skating rinks were popular hangout spots during the 90’s in China. While many have closed due to changes in the leisure habits of the citizens, some have remained open by modernizing their amenities and offering additional features such as the bump track portion seen here EDIT - bump track might be pump track instead, any skaters out there that can properly explain?
item.dc:creator: AkitaFuriosa
